description: Design UI — Source analytics + digest: Dashboard section in the Ideabox tab header. Source breakdown: bar chart of idea sources (competitor analysis, session insight, user feedback, research paper). Conversion funnel: NEW → DISCUSSING → PROMOTED (with kill rate). Cluster health: which clusters have the most ideas, most promoted, most killed. Time series: ideas added per week. All derived from ideabox.md metadata, no external tracking.
